<!--
Thanks for the pull request! Please fill out the sections below so the
review goes quickly.
-->

## What does this PR change?

A short description of the change. If it's wired to an issue, link it
here: `Closes #123`.

## Why?

What's the motivation? Sometimes the diff makes that obvious; often it
doesn't.

## How was it tested?

- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] UI tests pass under Xvfb (Linux) or natively (Windows/macOS)
- [ ] Manually verified on a real slave (describe below)

## Changelog entry

Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No — and here's why this doesn't need one: …

## Anything reviewers should look at extra carefully?

E.g. a non-obvious threading interaction, a public-API change, a new
dependency.
